title: Smoky French Tomato Omelet
description: A French twist on a classic omelet, featuring smoky flavors and fresh tomatoes.
instructions: In a pan, fry the bacon over medium heat until crispy.
Remove the bacon and set aside. Add the diced onion and cook until softened.
Add the diced tomato and cook for 2-3 minutes.
In a bowl, beat the eggs and season with salt and pepper.
Pour the eggs over the cooked onion and tomato mixture.
Cook the omelet until the eggs are almost set.
Add the crumbled bacon to one half of the omelet and fold the other half over.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes and serve hot.
